case_title: SERGE SOROKKO GALLERIES, INC., VS. AMERICAN ZURICH INSURANCE COMPANY et al

docket_entries.description: SUBROGATION/INSURANCE, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SERGE SOROKKO GALLERIES, INC. DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
